matching_strategy.exact: Normalized Copart model alias equals normalized official NHTSA model name for exactly one make.
matching_strategy.fuzzy: Token-prefix match against official NHTSA model name for exactly one make.
matching_strategy.manual_override: Model was assigned through the local manual overrides file.
matching_strategy.unassigned: No unique make match was found; review manually.
